Home > @imqueue/rpc > ProfileDecoratorOptions

ProfileDecoratorOptions interface

Signature:

export interface ProfileDecoratorOptions

Properties

Property

Modifiers

Type

Description

enableDebugArgs?

boolean

(Optional) Turns on/off arguments debugging

enableDebugTime?

boolean

(Optional) Turns on/off execution time debugging

logLevel?

LogLevel

(Optional) Defines log/level for logger, By default, is a log
